case_title: FAREZ, GLENN vs. MAMOUNIA MOROCCAN REST. A PARTNERSH OF SAID ZIANI et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF APPEAL OF THE ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF FAREZ, GLENN AS TO DEFENDANT MAMOUNIA MOROCCAN REST.  A PARTNERSH OF SAID ZIANI ZIANI, MEHDI ZIANI, SAID STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR DEC-06-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

JUDGE WICK, BETH WILBER - CLERK, BRENDA FIELDS - REPORTER: C/C FOR CT. TRIAL, ALL PARTIES PRESENT, CASE SETTLED ON THE RECORD. PLTF. AGREES TO DISMISS CASE WHEN PAID BY PLTF. (CONT'D TO DETERMINE IF DISMISSAL HAS BEEN FILED)
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO JAN-23-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01

#5 BENSON/BAUER: C/C TO DETERMINE COMPLIANCE W/ SETTLEMENT. PLTF G FAREZ PRESENT IN PRO PER. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFTS. PLTF SWORN, TESTIFIED THAT DEFTS COMPLIED IN PART. JDMT FOR PLTF AGAINST DEFTS. CLERK TO PREPARE JDMT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAMOUNIA MOROCCAN REST.  A PARTNERSH OF SAID ZIANI ZIANI, SAID $717.50 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $717.50
CLERKS NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
